title: Document intake with OCR and indexing
description: A scanned fictional filing moves through extraction, confidence review, chunking, and indexing.
benefit: Turn scans into searchable matter context
prompt: Process a scanned filing and surface low-confidence text.

events.text: Fictional intake workspace ready · document storage and vector index simulated
Coordinator routed intake review to Paralegal & Legal Ops.
OCR started · image preprocessing · page-level confidence enabled

events.title: scanned-order-fictional.pdf
events.text: 8 pages parsed · 6,420 characters extracted · 9 vector chunks prepared
Page 6 confidence is 68%. Verify the hearing date against the source image before relying on it.
Vector indexing complete · 9 chunks stored with filename, page, and matter metadata

events.title: scanned-order-fictional.pdf
events.snippet: A status conference appears on page 6, but the day numeral is below the configured confidence threshold.

events.text: The filing is searchable and associated with the fictional matter. Seven pages passed the review threshold. Page 6 needs visual confirmation because the date numeral was extracted at lower confidence. I have separated that item from the confirmed document metadata.

events.title: OCR verification checklist
events.text: A bounded verification checklist is ready.
Intake complete · the low-confidence item remains explicitly unresolved
